name: Princeton Indoor Golf Center
about: Princeton Indoor Golf Center offers golf simulation technology in an indoor setting. The venue provides a climate-controlled environment for golfers to practice and play year-round. Pricing and specific technology details are not available on the website, limiting the ability to fully assess its offerings.
why_golfers_like_it: Focus on practice and skill development

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: It is recommended to bring your own clubs, but rentals may be available. Contact the venue for confirmation.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: No information is available regarding outside food and drink policies. Contact the venue for details.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Time for 18 holes is not specified as it depends on simulator software and player pace. Contact the venue for more information.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No specific information about kid-friendly amenities or policies is available. Contact the venue directly for details.
